Reviews Fast delivery — worldwide Professional customer service 2500m² store Buy It For Life™ Sports products blog Info Store Customer service Outlet About us VIP Membership: Exclusive Benefits for You What is VIP Membership? VIP Membership offers you a unique opportunity to enjoy a 5 % discount on our regular-priced products. Please note that the product's margin structure may affect the discount rate, so the VIP discount might sometimes be less than 5 %. The discount does not apply to already discounted products. shipping.summary: These fees consist of the original delivery cost without possible discounts + shipping cost of the return package (= original delivery cost) + handling fee 10 €.

tax.summary: The price of the delivery to selected country is shown at the checkout.If the products are delivered outside EU (European Union), the buyer is responsible of all eventual taxes, customs duties, importation and other fees.

fee.summary: These fees consist of the original delivery cost without possible discounts + shipping cost of the return package (= original delivery cost) + handling fee 10 €.
